heading: Technical assistance; waiver of payments for costs; credits to appropriation or fund for payment of expenses
label: 4725 Technical assistance; waiver of payments for costs; credits to appropriation or fund for payment of expenses
text: The Office may furnish technical advice and assistance, on request, to State and general local governments seeking to improve their systems of personnel administration. The Office may waive, in whole or in part, payments from such governments for the costs of furnishing such assistance. All such payments shall be credited to the appropriation or fund from which the expenses were or are to be paid.
notes: Transfer of Functions“Office”, meaning Office of Personnel Management, substituted in text for “Commission”, meaning Civil Service Commission, pursuant to Reorg.
